name: year
description: Reference year of the ATUS interview (diary year).

name: tucaseid
description: ATUS case identification number; primary key that links all ATUS files. First four digits are the interview year.

name: activity_code
description: Six-digit ATUS activity code (2003-24 Coding Lexicon) that time was reported against.
observations: From the wide atussum t###### columns, reshaped to long. Coded by the ATUS Activity Coding Lexicon.

name: duration_minutes
description: Total minutes the respondent spent doing the activity on the diary day.
observations: Value of the corresponding atussum t###### column.
